tool.name: business_logic_scanner
tool.description: Test for business logic vulnerabilities in web applications.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Analyze multi-step workflows for bypass opportunities - Test for race condition vulnerabilities - Test parameter manipulation (price, quantity, discount) - Test workflow step skip vulnerabilities - Test numeric boundary manipulation - Generate test cases for specific workflow types - Detect state machine abuse and timing attacks

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - analyze_workflow: Analyze multi-step workflow for bypass - test_race: Test for race condition vulnerabilities - test_manipulation: Test parameter manipulation - test_skip: Test workflow step skip vulnerabilities - test_numeric: Test numeric boundary manipulation - generate_tests: Generate test cases for workflow type

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL for testing. Required for test_race, test_manipulation, test_numeric.

parameter.name: endpoints
parameter.description: Comma-separated list of workflow endpoint URLs. Required for analyze_workflow.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: JSON data for request body. Required for test_manipulation, test_numeric.

parameter.name: steps
parameter.description: JSON array of workflow steps for test_skip. Each step: {"url": "...", "method": "GET/POST", "data": {...}}

parameter.name: param_to_test
parameter.description: Parameter name to test for manipulation. Required for test_manipulation.

parameter.name: workflow_type
parameter.description: Workflow type for generate_tests: checkout, refund, payment, signup, password_reset

parameter.name: parallel_count
parameter.description: Number of parallel requests for race testing (default: 10)

returns.description: Business logic test results with vulnerability indicators and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Analyze a checkout workflow
analyze_workflow https://example.com/cart,https://example.com/shipping,https://example.com/payment
# Test for race condition on coupon application
test_race https://example.com/api/apply-coupon {"code": "DISCOUNT10"} 20
# Test price manipulation
test_manipulation https://example.com/api/order {"product_id": 123, "price": 99.99, "quantity": 1} price
# Test workflow step skipping
test_skip [{"url":"https://example.com/step1"},{"url":"https://example.com/step2","method":"POST"},{"url":"https://example.com/confirm"}]
# Test numeric boundary manipulation
test_numeric https://example.com/api/order {"quantity": 1, "price": 100, "discount_percent": 10}
# Generate test cases for checkout flow
generate_tests checkout https://example.com
